_note: Expanded-mode workflow for TAS_1. Used when target.json::target_granularity='expanded'. TAS_1 dispatches by svc_id to the internal stage atomics (TAS_{2..6}); each internal stage then calls one third-party atomic of the kind/operation declared in target.json::stage_routes. Architecturally separate from tas.json, which is the collapsed-mode workflow and dispatches directly to third-party atomics by kind.
